prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `a1aa0c1e`.
codex_response:
Implemented `a1aa0c1e`. The rule is: read the first three nonzero full-width bars top-to-bottom; for each one, count the solid `ccc` rows in its same-color 3-column alternating motif and write that bar color that many times in the output row, with the bottom bar color in column 4. I used the summary hint only as a partial starting point and corrected the last-column `5` rule in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a1aa0c1e/notes.md#L1): zero-motif rows are not eligible, and ties among the smallest positive counts break via the gray-pixel section. No new primitive was needed.

Task package files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a1aa0c1e/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a1aa0c1e/verifier.py#L4), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a1aa0c1e/generator.py#L11), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a1aa0c1e/notes.md#L1). Generated artifacts are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a1aa0c1e/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a1aa0c1e/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a1aa0c1e/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a1aa0c1e/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a1aa0c1e/previews/preview_03.png). Validation passed on all official examples (4/4), the shared build produced 1000 examples, and generated-example verification passed 1000/1000.
